basic_details.short_information: The Sardarkrushinagar Dantiwada Agricultural University (SDAU) has officially announced the Agricultural Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 29 April 2026 at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 40 years (male) and 45 years (female) and hold a Diploma/Polytechnic in Agriculture or Horticulture with computer knowledge can attend the walk-in interview on 11 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and details to attend the interview are shared below.

age_limit.age_details: Up to 40 years for male and 45 years for female candidate
age_limit.details: Up to 40 years for male candidates. Up to 45 years for female candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma (Agriculture/Horticulture), Polytechnic in (Agriculture/Horticulture), Knowledge of computer
qualification.details: Diploma (Agriculture/Horticulture) OR Polytechnic in (Agriculture/Horticulture) Knowledge of computer

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Agricultural Assistant.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Agricultural Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Agricultural Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 26,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Diploma in Agriculture/Horticulture or Polytechnic in Agriculture/Horticulture, along with computer knowledge.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit is up to 40 years for male candidates and up to 45 years for female candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category.

faq.question: Q8. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 11 May 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location?
faq.answer: The job location is Bhachau, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
